nuke_shell.title: Craft a Nuke Shell (Create: Nuclear Shell) — requires Alex's Caves Nuclear Bomb in Mechanical Crafter

steel_reactor.title: Build the Steel Reactor (Cannon Nukes) — multiblock uranium reactor that outputs Create rotational power

subtitle.text: The cannon is old technology. The shell is not. Thirty damage. Ignores armor. Full nuclear detonation on contact.

description: brings the nuclear fuel chain to its military end.
The Steel Reactor powers the factory.
The Nuke Shell delivers the factory's output.
Both are necessary. In that order.
└ Built-in Ponder tutorial (9 steps) — check in-game
Powers Create machines directly from fission
process separately from Alex's Caves uranium
· Hazmat Block, Nuclear Bomb, Hazmat Block
└ Requires fuse to detonate (no contact explosion)
└ Detonation: full Alex's Caves nuclear explosion
+ persistent radiation zone at impact site
└ Load into Create: Big Cannon to fire
▸ The shell was not designed for war.
The first use in combat was not authorized.
The second use established a doctrine.
The third use ended the civilization that made it.
Do not detonate near your base.
Do not detonate near anything you want to use again.
The cannon has range. Use it.
